title: gagea reticularis
intro: Gagea reticularis, also known as the net-leaved lily or net-leaved gagea, is a perennial plant species within the family Liliaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, and is often used to treat conditions like bronchitis and coughs. Gagea reticularis is typically prepared as a herbal infusion or tincture, and is also used in some traditional remedies in the form of a poultice or salve.
